footer.statement: A quiet, cinematic record of wildlife, mountain light and exploration in the Italian Alps.

sound.label: Ambience
sound.unavailable: Add the ambience audio asset to enable sound

home.title: Mountain Fauna Lover — Wildlife, Digiscoping and Alpine Stories
home.description: Through my lens, a 360° journey into the wild heart of the Alps. Wildlife observation, digiscoping, skiing and mountain exploration from Trentino-Alto Adige.

founder.title: Founder — Mattioli Simone
founder.description: Meet Mattioli Simone, the mountain and wildlife enthusiast behind Mountain Fauna Lover.

digiscoping.title: Digiscoping — Respect at a Distance
digiscoping.description: Discover digiscoping as a patient, respectful way to observe and document alpine wildlife from afar.

videos.title: Alpine Films
videos.description: A curated collection of cinematic wildlife, digiscoping, skiing and exploration videos from the Alps.

gear.title: Field Gear
gear.description: The observation, camera, mountain and editing tools behind Mountain Fauna Lover.

collaboration.title: Collaborate
collaboration.description: Collaborate with Mountain Fauna Lover on authentic outdoor, wildlife, tourism and cinematic mountain stories.

links.title: Follow the Mountain
links.description: Find Mountain Fauna Lover on YouTube, Instagram and TikTok, or connect with founder Mattioli Simone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How Mountain Fauna Lover handles contact form data, analytics and your privacy rights.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: How Mountain Fauna Lover uses language preferences, analytics and optional sound preferences.

hero.title: Through my lens, a 360° journey into the wild heart of the Alps.
hero.description: Wildlife observation, digiscoping, skiing and mountain exploration from Trentino-Alto Adige, Val di Rabbi and Stelvio National Park.

identity.title: Silence makes the wild visible.
identity.description: Mountain Fauna Lover documents the pauses between movement: a distant silhouette, snow crossing a ridge, a breath held behind the lens.
identity.quote: The animal stays in its world. I stay in mine. The lens becomes the bridge.

videos.title: Stories found by waiting.
videos.description: Cinematic moments from the alpine field, curated by hand.

digiscoping.title: A lens between two worlds.
digiscoping.description: Digiscoping turns patient observation into images without asking wildlife to surrender its space.

founder.title: Mattioli Simone
founder.description: Mountain observer, wildlife enthusiast and filmmaker from Trentino-Alto Adige, combining patience in the field with precision in technology.

gear.title: Tools for the long wait.
gear.description: Observation optics, camera systems, snow equipment and editing tools chosen to move lightly through the mountain.

collaboration.title: Create a story worth carrying home.
collaboration.description: Selected collaborations with brands, territories and creators who value the mountain, wildlife and honest cinematic work.

page.title: Field notes in motion.
page.description: Nine selected observations across wildlife, digiscoping, skiing and alpine exploration. Every film begins with distance, patience and attention.

videos.placeholder: This film slot is ready for a curated YouTube ID. Until then, continue directly to the Mountain Fauna Lover channel.

video01.title: The Quiet Before the Deer
video01.description: A patient wildlife observation at the edge of the alpine forest.

video02.title: Through the Spotting Scope
video02.description: A distant encounter translated through glass, air and mountain light.

video03.title: Val di Rabbi, Before Dawn
video03.description: Following the valley as fog lifts from the first ridge.

video04.title: Lines Across Winter
video04.description: A quiet descent through the geometry of alpine snow.

video05.title: A Silhouette in the Mist
video05.description: Wildlife appears for only a moment, then returns to the mountain.

video06.title: Respect at 60×
video06.description: Why distance is the most important part of the image.

video07.title: Stelvio Field Notes
video07.description: Wind, rock and the long roads into Stelvio National Park.

video08.title: Cold Air, First Track
video08.description: An alpine morning measured in breath, edges and light.

video09.title: The Mountain Keeps Watch
video09.description: A final observation from the border between forest and sky.

spottingScope.description: Spotting scope, phone or camera adapter, and careful manual control. Replace with the exact field setup.

cameraKit.description: A compact cinematic camera system prepared for changing alpine light. Replace with exact models.

tripod.name: Tripod & Support
tripod.description: Stable support for long observation and precise movement in uneven terrain.

skiKit.name: Ski & Mountain Equipment
skiKit.description: Technical winter equipment selected for safety, mobility and long days outside.

ebikeKit.name: E-bike & Offroad Equipment
ebikeKit.description: Exploration tools for reaching distant trailheads responsibly.

editingSuite.name: Editing & Software
editingSuite.description: The digital darkroom where field recordings become cinematic alpine stories.
